title: Twelve Hours to Live
writer: Cesare Zavattini, Suso Cecchi D'Amico, Vitaliano Brancati
actors: Jean Gabin, Elli Parvo, Antonella Lualdi
plot: One inattentive step under the wheels of a bus ended the life and career of a wealthy Roman industrialist Bacca in the prime of life. In the other world, he does not doubt that he is destined for paradise.
